Happy.text:
- Knock, knock. 
 - Who is there? 
 - Hatch. 
 - Hatch who? 
 - God bless you!
Two cannibals eating a clown, one turned to the other and said: Does this taste funny to you?
I'm on a whiskey diet. I've lost three days already.

What's the best thing about Switzerland? 
 I don't know, but their flag is a huge plus.

What do you call London without electricity? 
 Londoff.

Sad.text: Humans are scared of hippos because they are violent and responsible for hundreds of deaths per year. But people kill way more people per year so that is just being hippocritical.

What does a programmer say before his imminent death? 
 Bye world

What do you call a blonde in the freezer? 
 Her parents named her Cindy so we should probably continue to call her that. She was supposed to graduate tomorrow.

Why can't orphans play baseball? 
 They don't know where home is.

What caused the Great depression? 
 A lack of comedians

Scary.text:
What's the best thing you can do if you're feeling lonely? 
 Watch a scary movie. You won't feel lonely anymore.
Being a baby must be scary. Imagine going to sleep and waking up in Walmart.
If you think that your computer, laptop and phone spying on you is scary then think again, Because your vacuum cleaner has been gathering dirt on you for years
I have a scary joke about math... but I'm 2² to say it
I had a nightmare last night that my Tik Tok account was deleted. It was scary, because for a second I thought I had a Tik Tok account.

Angry.text: My therapist said I should write letters to people I hate and burn them. I did - now the police want to know why my neighbor's missing.

Why do Python programmers prefer to work in the dark? 
 Because they hate white space errors.
My girlfriend was really angry when I gave her a box of photos of all her old boyfriends for her birthday. I don't know why, she said she wanted an ex box
What happens if you you cross an angry cow with an angry sheep? You get two animals that are in a *baaaad moooood.*
My tennis opponent was not happy with my serve. He kept returning it.

Mysterious.text: Stirlitz and Kathe are walking through the park. A gunshot rings out. Kathe falls. Blood flows. Stirlitz, relying on his keen instincts, immediately gets suspicious.
The bermuda triangle used to be known as the bermuda rectangle, until one of the sides mysteriously vanished
What do you call a mystery Mexican? Juan Doe
My last girlfriend said I was unnecessarily mysterious. Or did she?
Something scary happened. A family on my street all died of mysterious head injuries. And I live a stone's throw from their house.

Disgusting.text: My girlfriend's parents called me a disgusting creep just because I am 36 and she is 24 What a horrible thing to say on our son's 10th birthday party.
Just found the absolute worst page in the dictionary What I saw was disgraceful, disgusting, dishonest and disingenuous.
What's the difference between a vegan and a computer programmer? One is disgusted by rack of lamb and the other is disgusted by lack of RAM
What is two times more disgusting than finding a worm in your apple? Finding half a worm in your apple
Did you hear about the milk incident at the farm? It was udderly disgusting

Bored.text: I hate seeing directors make the same movie. It gets boring, I guess I'm... Board of directors
What do kids play when they got nothing to do? Bored-games
Why did the Hobbit put his phone on silent? Because he was bored of the rings!
Some people say that baseball is a boring sport, I just tell them that with a good pitcher things can get out of hand pretty quickly.
I've worked in a masochistic shop for years. It's painfully boring.
